cashBack.description: A cardholder benefit that pays the cardholder a small percentage of their net expenditures.

contactlessPayment.description: A secure method for consumers to purchase products or services via debit, credit or smartcards by using RFID or NFC technology.

floorLimit.description: A floor limit is the amount of money above which credit card transactions must be authorized.

monthlyMinimumRepaymentAmount.description: The minimum payment is the lowest amount of money that one is required to pay on a credit card statement each month.

description: A payment method using a credit, debit, store or other card to associate the payment with an account.
title: PaymentCard
